title: Lead or drift: A united EU is key to clean shipping [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Shipping faces a defining moment as governments meet at the IMO to decide its path to decarbonisation. Europe’s leadership and unity will be critical— now is the moment to hold the line on a strong Net Zero Framework and drive investment toward zero-emission fuels and a resilient maritime future.
